name: ASUS PRIME Z790-P WIFI D4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR4-5333(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - Thunderbolt (USB4) Header - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6
shortName: ASUS PRIME Z790-P WIFI D4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe
description: Intel LGA 1700 ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0 and DDR4 support for DDR4-equipped 12th-gen systems.
